title: athanasia flexuosa
intro: Athanasia flexuosa, also known as the Red Hottentot Tea plant, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, due to its adaptogenic and nervine effects. Athanasia flexuosa is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to support overall well-being and alleviate stress.
